title: Track and Field Favorites
description: My favorite track and field videos - mostly 400m hurdles races, world championships, and technique breakdowns.

title: World Champs Replays 2023
description: Full race replays and highlights from the 2023 World Athletics Championships in Budapest.

title: World Champs Replays 2025
description: Full race replays and highlights from the 2025 World Athletics Championships in Tokyo.

title: 400m Hurdles Technique
description: Technical breakdowns, stride analysis, and race strategy videos for 400m hurdles. Love revisiting these from a coaching perspective.

title: Garden How-Tos
description: Backyard gardening tutorials I keep coming back to. Mostly herb spirals and raised beds.

title: Herb Spiral Build and Maintenance
description: Everything on herb spiral construction, plant selection, and year-round maintenance. Building one in the backyard this summer.

title: PT Exercise Demos
description: Pediatric PT exercise demonstrations I use for inspiration and continuing education. Kessler and others.

title: Pediatric Gait and Movement
description: Videos on normal and atypical pediatric gait patterns, balance, and functional movement. Great clinical reference.

title: Half Marathon Training
description: Training plans, long run tips, and race recaps for the Columbus Half Marathon. Running it again this October.

title: Columbus Running
description: Local Columbus running events, course recaps, and community running content.

title: USATF Championships
description: US track and field championship coverage. Always watch when there is good 400m hurdles action.

title: Diamond League Highlights
description: Diamond League track meets with great hurdles races. Paris and Eugene usually have the best fields.

title: Junior and Youth Track
description: Youth and junior championships - love watching the next generation of hurdlers. Also useful for my own coaching perspective.

title: FloTrack Favorites
description: Best content from FloTrack - technique breakdowns, training features, meet coverage.

title: Core and Strength for PT Clients
description: Exercise demonstration videos I share context from with pediatric patients and families. Core and lower extremity focus.

title: Sensory and Developmental PT
description: Sensory integration and developmental milestones content. Good reference for parent education.

title: Indoor Track Meets
description: Indoor track and field championships - World Athletics Indoors, Millrose Games, etc.

title: Herb Garden Seasonal Tips
description: Seasonal gardening content - spring starts, summer harvest, fall prep. Backyard herbs through the Ohio seasons.

title: Race Prep and Strategy
description: Running race strategy, pacing guides, and race day prep for half marathon distance.

title: Watch Later - Track
description: Private queue of track videos to watch during lunch break.
